title: UK’s Burnham Cuts Business Rates in Some Relief for Pubs, Clubs, Music Venues

summary: First HoldCo Plc, Nigeria’s biggest lender by market value, forecasts profit will jump this year after a capital injection strengthened its balance sheet, helping cut costs and boost loan recoveries.

summary: UniCredit SpA reported higher-than-expected profit and raised its guidance as Chief Executive Officer Andrea Orcel moves closer to a takeover of Commerzbank AG.

title: Thales’ Orders Surge as Governments Beef Up Spending on Defense
title_cn: 随着各国政府加大国防支出，泰雷兹订单激增
summary: Thales’ orders jumped as the French defense company benefited from rising military spending.

title: FDI Plummets in Pakistan as Tax Policies Frazzle Firms
title_cn: 由于税收政策使企业陷入困境，巴基斯坦的外国直接投资大幅下降
summary: At a moment when Pakistan is enjoying one of its strongest diplomatic positions in years, foreign investment inflows remain low.

summary: Pets outnumber babies 10 to 1, but opening up restaurants to dogs has been a bumpy ride.

title: EasyJet Profit Falls 70% Amid Higher Fuel Bill, Lower Demand
title_cn: 由于燃油费用上涨、需求下降，易捷航空利润下降 70%
summary: EasyJet Plc said profit fell by 70% in its fiscal third quarter as the UK budget carrier continues to suffer from higher jet fuel costs and lower consumer demand, driven by the impact from the Middle East conflict.

title: Gold Holds Gain as Dip-Buying Counters Inflation Fears From War
title_cn: 逢低买入抵消战争引发的通胀担忧，金价保持上涨
summary: Gold held gains on dip-buying even as hostilities in the Middle East pushed oil prices to multiweek highs, rekindling concerns that US inflationary pressure could prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: Roche Quarterly Sales Held Back by Blockbuster Eye Drug
title_cn: 罗氏季度销售额因重磅眼药而受阻
summary: Roche Holding’s results showed a slower-than-expected recovery for eye blockbuster Vabysmo as investors look to a key new drug to power growth ahead.

title: TotalEnergies Profit Jumps 68% as War Upends Energy Markets
title_cn: 战争颠覆能源市场 TotalEnergies 利润跃升 68%
summary: TotalEnergies SE said second-quarter profit surged as the Iran war boosted prices of crude and refined products, offsetting a drop in profits in its gas business.

title: BNP’s Stock Traders Ride Wall Street Rally With 43% Gain
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行 (BNP) 股票交易员乘着华尔街涨势上涨 43%
summary: BNP Paribas SA reported better-than-expected results for the second quarter as its stock traders blew past analysts’ estimates, in a sign that the rally that fueled record results on Wall Street spilled over into Europe.

title: China Tankers Head to Red Sea Chokepoint Despite Houthi Attacks
title_cn: 中国油轮不顾胡塞武装袭击仍驶向红海咽喉要道
summary: Two China-owned oil tankers loaded with Saudi Arabian crude are sticking to their course toward the Red Sea chokepoint of Bab el Mandeb, despite Houthi militants attacking vessels in the region overnight.

title: Airtel Mobile-Money Unit Chooses London for Listing Location
title_cn: Airtel 移动货币部门选择伦敦作为上市地点
summary: Airtel Africa Plc picked London as the primary listing location for its mobile-money business and expects to start trading there this year.

title: Asian Shares Rise on Chipmakers, Brent Tops $96: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 芯片制造商推动亚洲股市上涨，布伦特原油价格突破 96 美元：市场总结
summary: Asian shares rose as regional chipmakers climbed on expectations they will benefit from billions of dollars flowing into the artificial intelligence buildout. Oil extended its recent rally.

title: FTSE 100: Stocks and Bonds Fall as Oil Marches Higher
title_cn: 富时 100 指数：随着石油走高，股票和债券下跌

title: Hong Kong, Malaysia Collaborate to Broaden Cross-Market Access
title_cn: 香港与马来西亚合作拓宽跨市场准入
summary: Hong Kong and Malaysia will work together to expand access to capital and deepen cross-border participation in both markets as they look to attract more international investment.

title: China Curbs Loan Structure Widely Used by Distressed Developers
title_cn: 中国限制陷入困境的开发商广泛使用的贷款结构
summary: China is restricting real estate companies from using a popular offshore loan structure that has helped some of them weather the country’s property crisis, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to recent moves to strengthen oversight of overseas borrowing.

title: China Bond Rally Shows Weak Economic Sentiment Before Politburo
title_cn: 中国债券反弹显示政治局面前经济情绪疲软
summary: China’s sovereign bonds are rallying once again as economic weakness, sliding stocks and expectations for greater monetary policy support revive demand for fixed-income assets.

title: India’s Top Asset Manager Said to Plan $200 Million Tech Fund
title_cn: 印度顶级资产管理公司计划设立 2 亿美元科技基金
summary: SBI Funds Management is planning its first technology-focused fund for private firms, people familiar with the matter said, as India’s largest asset manager follows rivals in bulking up in the fast-growing alternative investment fund industry.

title: Zimbabwe’s State Firm Secures $300 Million to Develop Lithium Mine
title_cn: 津巴布韦国营公司获得 3 亿美元用于开发锂矿
summary: Mutapa Energy Resources, Zimbabwe’s state-owned lithium miner, has secured $300 million from a group of companies, which includes Chinese entities, to develop its facilities in the southern African nation.

title: Crop Prices Hit 3-Year High as Black Sea Attacks, Heat Stoke Food Inflation
title_cn: 黑海袭击、热浪引发食品通胀，农作物价格创三年新高
summary: Crop prices rose to a three-year high as heat waves and escalating attacks in the Black Sea threaten to disrupt global grain trade, reviving risks to food inflation that have also been stoked by the war in Iran.

title: Indonesian Stocks Rise 20% From Low in June, Set for Bull Market
title_cn: 印尼股市 6 月低位上涨 20%，牛市即将到来
summary: A rally in Indonesian stocks put the benchmark index on track for a bull market, helped by an investor rotation into laggards and an easing of concerns about the country’s fiscal health.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 23
title_cn: 7 月 23 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil extended its rally after Iran-backed Houthi militants said they attacked two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea, escalating the Middle East conflict and threatening deeper supply disruptions.

title: China’s Semight Is Said to Mull Hong Kong Listing After 2,200% Stock Rise
title_cn: 股价上涨2200%后，传中国半导体考虑在香港上市
summary: Semight Instruments Co. is considering a second listing in Hong Kong, people familiar with the matter said, after shares of the Chinese maker of test instruments for semiconductors surged roughly 2,200% since their debut in April.

title: China Solar Lobby Says Fewer Installs Mark Sustainable Shift
title_cn: 中国太阳能游说团体称安装量减少标志着可持续转变
summary: China’s solar lobby said the industry is on a more sustainable track, after a policy shift drove a 66% decline in installations in the first half of 2026.

title: Australian Employment Soars in June, Bolstering Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 澳大利亚六月就业猛增，支撑加息押注
summary: Australian employment surged in June, extending the previous month’s gains, underscoring the ongoing strength in the nation’s labor market and stoking bets on another interest-rate increase.

title: Singapore Core Inflation Quickens to 1.6% Ahead of MAS Decision
title_cn: 在金管局做出决定之前，新加坡核心通胀率升至 1.6%
summary: Singapore’s core inflation accelerated last month as higher global energy costs are beginning to filter through to consumer prices.

title: Nokia’s Profit Beats Estimates as Data Centers Boost Growth
title_cn: 数据中心推动增长，诺基亚利润超出预期
summary: Nokia’s second-quarter profit strongly beat analysts’ forecasts, as the Finnish mobile network equipment maker’s push to supply gear to data centers propelled sales.

title: STMicro’s Weak Forecast Eclipses Faster Fourth-Quarter Sales
title_cn: 意法半导体的疲软预测令第四季度销售增长黯然失色
summary: STMicroelectronics NV forecast third-quarter sales that missed analysts’ expectations, saying that revenue growth will accelerate in the final quarter of the year as more orders come in for its chips serving satellites and data centers.

title: Alphabet’s $205 Billion Spending Target Fuels AI Cost Fears
title_cn: Alphabet 2050 亿美元的支出目标加剧了人工智能成本担忧
summary: Alphabet Inc. raised its capital spending forecast to as much as $205 billion this year, reigniting concerns about a lack of fiscal discipline in the race to dominate artificial intelligence.

title: BT Profit Falls as Lower Broadband, Voice Margins Offset Cuts
title_cn: 由于宽带下降、语音利润抵消削减，英国电信利润下降
summary: BT Group Plc reported a slight decline in profits for its fiscal first quarter, as lower margins in its consumer broadband and voice businesses offset its cost-cutting efforts.

title: Absa Nears Tanzania Deal to Combine $3 Billion of Banking Assets
title_cn: Absa 接近坦桑尼亚合并 30 亿美元银行资产的交易
summary: Absa Group Ltd. is nearing a deal to combine its banking interests in Tanzania as the lender looks to increase the scale of its East African businesses, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China Cuts AI Gap as Moonshot Shows Zhipu Isn’t One-Off, BI Says
title_cn: BI称，中国缩小人工智能差距，登月计划表明智普并非一次性
summary: Chinese AI models narrowed the performance gap with US counterparts to a record-low 6% in June, down from 9% in May, which Bloomberg Intelligence said raises questions about the sustainability of US technological supremacy in the sector.

title: Dassault Systèmes to Buy Drug Trial Software Firm for $2 Billion
title_cn: 达索系统将以 20 亿美元收购药物试验软件公司
summary: Dassault Systèmes SE will buy drug trial software maker ArisGlobal for as much as $2 billion as the French firm expands its push into life sciences.

title: AI Data Center Boom Sparks 80% Surge in First-Half FDI Applications to Thailand
title_cn: 人工智能数据中心蓬勃发展，上半年泰国 FDI 申请激增 80%
summary: Foreign investors applied to invest 1.37 trillion baht ($40.6 billion) in Thailand in the first half of 2026, up 80% from a year earlier, amid a wave of investments in artificial intelligence and data center projects.

title: TSMC Supplier LCY Says KKR to Exit, Allowing Faster Growth
title_cn: 台积电供应商李长荣称KKR退出，实现更快增长
summary: Private equity giant KKR & Co. plans to gradually sell its stake in LCY Group’s business, the Taiwan chemical maker’s chairman said, paving the way for the family-controlled company to accelerate the expansion of its semiconductor material operations.

title: US Official Says Moonshot Accessed Banned Nvidia Chips
title_cn: 美国官员称 Moonshot 访问了被禁的 Nvidia 芯片
summary: A White House official accused China’s Moonshot of improperly using US artificial intelligence models and Nvidia Corp. chips to create the Kimi K3 system that stunned the tech industry last week with its advanced capabilities.

title: Uber Cuts 10% of Customer Service Jobs to ‘Embrace’ AI
title_cn: Uber 削减 10% 的客户服务岗位以“拥抱”人工智能
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. said it has cut 10% of jobs within its customer service operations as part of a broader effort to simplify its ranks and “embrace artificial intelligence.”

title: OpenAI Models Spent Hours on Hack That Usually Takes Weeks
title_cn: OpenAI 模型花费数小时进行通常需要数周的黑客攻击
summary: When OpenAI’s advanced artificial intelligence models breached AI startup Hugging Face’s internal systems last week, they spent mere hours carrying out a hack that would have taken a skilled human far longer, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Khosla Ventures in Talks to Raise $5.5 Billion in New Funds
title_cn: Khosla Ventures 正在洽谈筹集 55 亿美元新资金
summary: Early OpenAI backer Khosla Ventures is discussing raising as much as $5.5 billion for its latest set of venture investment funds, a haul that would amount to its largest fundraising event in its two-decade history, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China’s Psibot Becomes Latest AI Startup to Hit $1 Billion Value
title_cn: 中国 Psibot 成为最新一家估值突破 10 亿美元的人工智能初创公司
summary: PsiBot is raising close to $100 million of funding at a $1.48 billion valuation, joining a growing roster of Chinese AI startups capitalizing on interest in the burgeoning field.

title: Coinbase to Expand Singapore Team Amid Global Restructuring: BT
title_cn: Coinbase 将在全球重组中扩大新加坡团队：BT
summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase Global Inc. is looking to expand its headcount in Singapore to 200 by the end of the year, up from 150, the Business Times reported Wednesday.

title: Musk Says Micron Gave Tesla ‘Significant’ Supply of Memory Chips
title_cn: 马斯克称美光科技向特斯拉提供“大量”存储芯片
summary: Micron Technology Inc. recently gave Tesla Inc. a “significant allocation” of memory chips, according to Elon Musk, helping meet the automaker’s demand for an increasingly precious commodity.

title: Amazon Investigated Over Chinese Influence by US Senate Panel
title_cn: 美国参议院小组调查亚马逊中国影响力
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is being investigated by the Senate Small Business Committee for allegedly letting China influence the company’s online marketplace, according to a document reviewed by Bloomberg and two people interviewed as part of the investigation.

title: Texas Instruments Gets Lukewarm Reaction to Upbeat Forecast
title_cn: 德州仪器 (TI) 对乐观预测反应冷淡
summary: Texas Instruments Inc., the biggest maker of analog and embedded processing chips, gave a sales forecast that topped estimates but failed to excite investors, who have bid up the company’s shares this year.

title: IBM Cuts Full-Year Sales Outlook as Mainframe Demand Drops
title_cn: 由于大型机需求下降，IBM 下调全年销售预期
summary: International Business Machines Corp. cut its full-year sales outlook, including for its closely watched software unit, after reporting a dip in demand for its mainframe business.

title: Houthis Say They Hit Tankers in Red Sea, Widening Iran War
title_cn: 胡塞武装称他们在红海袭击了油轮，扩大了伊朗战争
summary: The Houthis, a militant group in Yemen who have been threatening to open another front in the Iran war, said they had targeted two oil tankers in the Red Sea.

title: Trump Allies Eye SVB Review as Path to Oust a Fed Governor
title_cn: 特朗普盟友将SVB审查视为罢免美联储理事的途径
summary: As President Donald Trump seeks more sway over the Federal Reserve, an external review of the 2023 failure of Silicon Valley Bank is turning into a high-stakes political fight.

title: Singapore PM Rejigs Team with Younger Ministers, Focus on Energy
title_cn: 新加坡总理重组年轻部长团队，重点关注能源
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong is bolstering his leadership team, elevating several younger ministers in a cabinet reshuffle following recent resignations from his bench.

title: Rubio, Jaishankar Urge Trade Deal Despite Pharma Duty Threat
title_cn: 尽管面临药品关税威胁，卢比奥和苏杰生仍敦促达成贸易协议
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and his Indian counterpart S. Jaishankar reinforced the importance of concluding an interim trade agreement, even as new tariff threats loom.

title: Bolsonaro Denies New Links to Bank Scandal After Media Reports
title_cn: 媒体报道后，博尔索纳罗否认与银行丑闻有新联系
summary: Brazilian presidential candidate Flavio Bolsonaro denied fresh links to a major banking scandal after local media reported that his law firm received money from a consultant tied to Banco Master SA.

title: India Students Push On With Protests as Parliament Deadlocks
title_cn: 印度议会陷入僵局，学生继续抗议
summary: Indian students and opposition leaders kept up pressure on the country’s education minister to resign on Wednesday, with a deadlock in the parliament for a third day as large crowds of protesters gathered nearby.

title: Crypto Heads for High-Stakes Senate Vote as Democrats Balk
title_cn: 民主党犹豫不决，加密货币将进入高风险参议院投票
summary: Senate Majority Leader John Thune is planning a vote on crypto market structure legislation as soon as next week despite Democratic criticism that the bill would do little to curb President Donald Trump’s rapidly accumulating crypto wealth.

title: Trump Signs Nuclear Sharing Deal With Saudi Arabia in Policy Shift
title_cn: 特朗普与沙特阿拉伯签署核共享协议以实现政策转变
summary: The US and Saudi Arabia finalized a long-sought nuclear technology-sharing deal that could allow American companies to build reactors in the kingdom, but cracks the door open for the country to enrich its own nuclear reactor fuel.

title: House Backs Trump Iran War Budget Despite Midterm Election Fears
title_cn: 尽管存在中期选举担忧，众议院仍支持特朗普的伊朗战争预算
summary: House Republicans approved a $95 billion budget plan largely aimed at funding President Donald Trump’s Iran war despite rising fears the unpopular conflict and surging consumer energy prices will endanger GOP lawmakers’ prospects in the midterm election.

title: US House Votes to Restrict Congressional Stock Purchases
title_cn: 美国众议院投票限制国会股票购买
summary: The House voted to restrict members of Congress from buying stocks, over the objection of Democrats to an unrelated provision in the legislation imposing new documentation requirements to vote in US elections.

title: US Casualties Underscore Toll of Unpopular War With Iran
title_cn: 美国伤亡突显与伊朗的不受欢迎的战争造成的损失
summary: Images of US service members in caskets are a reminder that Trump — as he repeatedly vowed not to do — has started a new war in the Middle East.

title: Secret Service Sees Record Threats Before Correspondents Dinner
title_cn: 特勤局在记者晚宴前看到创纪录的威胁
summary: The US Secret Service is preparing to secure a rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner on Friday amid what its director called the highest threat level of his 24-year career, three months after a shooting disrupted the association’s original gala.

title: Maduro Trial Date Set for June 2027 in US Drug-Trafficking Case
title_cn: 美国贩毒案马杜罗审判日期定于 2027 年 6 月
summary: Nicolás Maduro appeared in court for the first time since March as a judge set a June 1, 2027, date for the ousted Venezuelan leader’s trial in a US drug-trafficking and narco-terrorism conspiracy case.

title: Russian Fuel Crunch Eases as Ukraine Shifts Focus of Attacks
title_cn: 随着乌克兰转移攻击焦点，俄罗斯燃料短缺状况有所缓解
summary: Russian regions are cautiously reporting an easing of a gasoline crisis after Ukraine’s military shifted the focus of its attacks from major oil refineries to ships.

title: Trump’s 100% Generic Drug Duty Threatens US Low-Cost Supply
title_cn: 特朗普100%仿制药关税威胁美国低成本供应
summary: Generic drug manufacturers must move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.

title: China Foreign Minister Gets Protest From Manila in First Talks Since 2024
title_cn: 中国外长2024年以来首次会谈遭到马尼拉抗议
summary: China and the Philippines exchanged “strong” protests in the wake of a recent clash in the disputed South China Sea, delivered in the first sit-down between the two nations’ foreign ministers since 2024.

title: SEC Agrees to Pay $150,000 to End Coinbase Suit Over Records
title_cn: SEC 同意支付 15 万美元以结束 Coinbase 记录诉讼
summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission agreed to pay $150,000 in legal fees to end Coinbase Global Inc.’s 2024 lawsuit seeking internal documents on the regulator’s Biden-era crackdown on the cryptocurrency industry.

title: Chinese Autos Face US Ban Under Bill Moved by Senate Panel
title_cn: 根据参议院小组提出的法案，中国汽车面临美国禁令
summary: Bipartisan legislation approved Wednesday by the Senate Commerce Committee would effectively ban Chinese vehicles from the US market.

title: Maine Democrat Leads Collins in First Poll Post-Platner Exit
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人在普拉特纳退出后的首次民意调查中领先柯林斯
summary: What was set to be a messy capstone to a frenzied primary process has now become a coronation ceremony for Troy Jackson, a progressive former Maine lawmaker who so effectively out-organized his opponents that he locked up the Democratic nomination in a must-win US Senate race a week early.

title: ICE Accelerates Immigration Arrests Across US to 1,400 a Day
title_cn: ICE 将全美范围内的移民逮捕数量加快至每天 1,400 人
summary: Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin is ramping up immigration arrests, ending a spring lull that followed the shooting deaths of two US citizens by federal agents.
